'''fapuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hickatee|hickatee]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-p-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hickatee|hickatee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fapuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fæpihith|fæpihith]] || [[word:fæpihij|fæpihij]] || [[word:fæpihish|fæpihish]] || [[word:fæpihi|fæpihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fapupuhuth|fapupuhuth]] || [[word:fapupuhuj|fapupuhuj]] || [[word:fapupuhush|fapupuhush]] || [[word:fapupuhu|fapupuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fapuhuth|fapuhuth]] || [[word:fapuhuj|fapuhuj]] || [[word:fapuhush|fapuhush]] || [[word:fapuhu|fapuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fapufhuth|fapufhuth]] || [[word:fapufhuj|fapufhuj]] || [[word:fapufhush|fapufhush]] || [[word:fapufhuf|fapufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fapuhuthu|fapuhuthu]] || [[word:fapuhuju|fapuhuju]] || [[word:fapuhushu|fapuhushu]] || [[word:fapuhuku|fapuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fapuhuth|fapuhuth]] || [[word:fapuhuj|fapuhuj]] || [[word:fapuhush|fapuhush]] || [[word:fapuhu|fapuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fapuhuthul|fapuhuthul]] || [[word:fapuhujul|fapuhujul]] || [[word:fapuhushul|fapuhushul]] || [[word:fapuhukul|fapuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fapuhuthuthu|fapuhuthuthu]] || [[word:fapuhujuju|fapuhujuju]] || [[word:fapuhushushu|fapuhushushu]] || [[word:fapuhuku|fapuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fapuhuthun|fapuhuthun]] || [[word:fapuhujun|fapuhujun]] || [[word:fapuhushun|fapuhushun]] || [[word:fapuhukun|fapuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fapuhuthuoro|fapuhuthuoro]] || [[word:fapuhujuoro|fapuhujuoro]] || [[word:fapuhushuoro|fapuhushuoro]] || [[word:fapuhukuoro|fapuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
